message:
hardening(frankenterm-gui, mux-server, frankenterm): replace panicking Mux::get() with try_get() + thread+context cleanups

Companion to the frankenterm-core hardening pass. Across the three new
binary/impl crates (gui, mux-server, mux-server-impl) plus the top-level
frankenterm shim crate:

  * `Mux::get()` (which panics if the singleton is uninitialized) is
    replaced everywhere with `Mux::try_get()` plus an `anyhow::Context`
    on the `None` case. The error message in each site reads "mux
    singleton is not available", so a future "no mux" condition is
    surfaced as a clean error instead of a panic during async startup.
  * Helpers like `have_panes_in_domain_and_ws` now take `&Mux` as a
    parameter instead of fetching the singleton themselves — fewer
    redundant lookups, less coupling.
  * frankenterm-gui termwindow/render/ refactors: draw, paint,
    fancy_tab_bar, screen_line, tab_bar all clean up the
    GraphicsAdapterContext lifecycle and rectify a few mistyped
    coordinate plumbing paths.
  * Overlay modules (confirm_close_pane, copy, debug, launcher,
    quickselect, charselect, paneselect, palette) get consistent
    Result-based plumbing.
  * Termwindow keyevent / mouseevent / clipboard / selection / resize:
    error wrapping + small ergonomics fixes.
  * Stats / glyphcache / colorease / spawn / native_bridge / update:
    clearer error wrapping + matched signatures.
  * Scripting/guiwin: similar.
  * frankenterm-mux-server-impl: dispatch + sessionhandler + lib +
    dispatch_conformance test all updated to match the trimmed mux
    API surface.
  * frankenterm-mux-server: main + ossl Cleanups (TLS context handling,
    init order).
  * crates/frankenterm/src/main.rs: cleaner CLI bootstrap and Mux init.

No behavioral changes for users running with a properly initialized
mux — only error messages change (and now we don't panic at startup
on misconfigured environments).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
